case_title: BUTTERFIELD AND BUTTERFIELD VS GOORWITCH RAFE

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $766.84 FILED BY BUTTERFIELD AND BUTTERFIELD AS TO DEFENDANT GOORWITCH RAFE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-04-1991 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 03

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BUTTERFIELD AND BUTTERFIELD RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GOORWITCH RAFE $766.84 PRINCIPAL, $8.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $774.84 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
